case_title: STEVEN TILLOTSON VS. SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFFSTEVEN TILLOTSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY, REPRESENTED BY REMY WEILAND, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $804.34 FILED BY TILLOTSON, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TILLOTSON, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY $804.34 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $874.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
